posts.text: If you think that most people's top priority is 'freedom' then you must have been in a coma all through 2020-2022.

posts.text: After years of complaining about the 'MSM' and their dishonesty, fear mongering, and sensationalism, it's a shame that so many people have taken to social media to run the exact same playbook... just with even lower standards of integrity.
